text: Standing here, I sense the sterile weight of a place built for observation and analysis. The glass walls and glaring fluorescent lights seem to both invite and repel. The R+D display feels like a shrine to innovation, yet there's a discomfort in its curated transparency—a tension between openness and surveillance. I feel hyper-aware, as if my presence is part of the experiment itself. It is both intriguing and unsettling, and I can't help but ponder my role in this carefully constructed environment.
